zh.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford是William Woodford的兒子，於大約1300年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯。他於1320年與Alice Preste在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1318年住在英國萊希斯特斯爾維易福德比。他去世於1362年在英國萊希斯特斯爾布倫廷比享年63歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾索普 阿諾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford是William Woodford的儿子，于大约1300年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯。他于1320年与Alice Preste在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1318年住在英国萊希斯特斯爾維易福德比。他去世于1362年在英国萊希斯特斯爾布倫廷比享年63岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾索普 阿諾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woodford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford was born about 1300, in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William Woodford. He married Alice Preste in 1320, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Wyfordby, Leicestershire, England in 1318. He died in 1362, in Brentingby, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford est né environ 1300, à Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William Woodford. Il a épousé Alice Preste en 1320, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Wyfordby, Leicestershire, Angleterre en 1318. Il est décédé en 1362, à Brentingby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodfordは約1300年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルトン ラザルズでWilliam Woodfordの息子として生まれた。1320年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイでAlice Presteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年にはイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイフォードビーに住んでいた。彼は1362年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブレンティングビーで63歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアソルペ アルノルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford(은)는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 버턴 라자르스에서 William Woodford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 Alice Preste(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1318년도에 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이퍼드비에서 살았다. 그는 1362년 영국 레이스스터실르 브렌틴그비에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 소 아노드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William Woodford. Ele casou-se com Alice Preste em 1320, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Wyfordby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra em 1318. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Brentingby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir. John de Woodford родился около 1300 г. в местности буртон лазарс, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William Woodford. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Preste в 1320 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности вифордби, лисестиршир, Англия в 1318 году. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности брентингби, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности таурп арнолд, лисестиршир, Англия.

Murió en 1362, en Brentingby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Thorpe Arnold, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
